Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Average
Recovery 51 • Sleep 62 • Strain —

Read
Recovery is middling, and the long gap since the last meal has the evening window under-supplied. With protein still carrying the day, this favors a protein-forward plate with steady carbs over pushing intensity from a deficit.

Muscle first.

Performance: Muscle first.
